Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: A core focus is critiquing '異化勞動' (alienated labor) and questioning the '工作勞動是否仍有意義' (meaning of work) in the AI era, directly addressing decent work (Target 8.5).

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: Critiques '商品拜物教' (commodity fetishism) and the '文化工業' (culture industry), which are foundational analyses of unsustainable consumption patterns and mass production (Targets 12.6, 12.8).

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: Discusses '政治正當性' (political legitimacy), '民主理論的解決' (democratic theory solution), and the 'public sphere', directly addressing accountable and participatory institutions (Targets 16.6, 16.7).
